title: QUOKKA Trivia Card Games For Kids 8-12 - Set 4 in 1 Board Games for Adults & Teens 12+ Who Know It Better? - Kids & Family Card Quiz - Fun & Educational Questions for Children & Family Gatherings

features: ENGAGING TRIVIA GAME FOR ADULTS & TEENS 12+: Challenge your knowledge with thought-provoking questions on Math, Chemistry, Culture & Biology; A must-have for fans of trivia games for adults; Ideal for social gatherings & friendly competition

500 UNIQUE QUESTIONS – ENDLESS FUN: Never play the same game twice with diverse topics that spark discussions & debates; A great alternative to traditional board games for adults; Each round lasts 15 minutes, making it perfect for any occasion

PERFECT FOR FAMILY GAME NIGHTS & PARTIES: Designed for game nights, travel, and gatherings; This interactive trivia experience makes a great addition to family games; Play with 2+ players & enjoy hours of entertainment with friends & loved ones

PREMIUM CARD GAME WITH EASY RULES: High-quality, durable cards ensure long-lasting fun; Simple gameplay – pick a question, guess the answer & see who knows better; A great choice for those who love card games but want a new twist

A MEMORABLE GIFT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: This trivia challenge is an excellent gift for knowledge seekers; Whether you're looking for family board games for kids and adults or a unique party activity, this game is a must-have for any collection
description: Product Description Let the fun games begin! Looking for endless fun? Dive into our kid's card games collection! From thrilling matches to hilarious challenges, there's something for everyone. Get ready to shuffle, deal, and laugh your way to victory. Let the games begin! Enjoy hours with your family! How well do you really know your family or your friend? Our Card game includes more than 500 fun questions, so you can spend many enjoyable hours with your friends and family, asking them How well you think do you know me? PERFECT GIFT FOR EVERYONE: Our board card game by QUOKKA is a fun gift choice for family members or friends of all ages. It's a thoughtful and entertaining way to foster deeper connections and create lasting memories through friendly competition and laughter This game by QUOKKA for kids and adults that can be played inside, outdoors, and anywhere It is great for parties! Science-based games introduce an element of friendly competition that motivates players to absorb knowledge and apply critical thinking skills This game by QUOKKA is a great idea for spending time together. Reveal the layers of friendship with our card game. The game "Who Knows Me Better?" has more than 500 interesting questions and answer options. Previous page Next page SIMPLE TO LEARN: It has easy rules, so people of any age can play it. Players take turns answering lighthearted and thought-provoking questions about each other's preferences, experiences, and quirks, earning points for accurate guesses.
